message:
chore: add proptest regression seeds for bloom_filter and ewma

Preserves failure seeds from recent fixes so all agents benefit from
these known-tricky inputs during proptest runs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,3 +6,4 @@
 # everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
 cc 4cdeceeeef942732db36b4f9d07a067e715976c2e1e86abfa5df9c85fe88869c # shrinks to capacity = 2129, fp_rate = 0.049
 cc b248cd685d78dcec61b53bc04d5a1871ad89bd68c03419d2d22e42ffc777df26 # shrinks to capacity = 221, fp_rate = 0.032
+cc 31bd07e2fd672108dc8fca097fff8e2a2deadd1a5df09f7e9169df8308b07a3b # shrinks to capacity = 1629, fp_rate = 0.009

@@ -5,3 +5,4 @@
 # It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
 # everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
 cc f67b0dd4ae4bb48dab7df67e5918e49f09cf2589365d81234d7b8abf816e7f48 # shrinks to hl = 45.70585398955081
+cc 7dc9ff1695950cefceb8ae591d6542d06659110f151d2c7810c2706713ef24f4 # shrinks to hl = 14.547327298291169
